text: if a customer mentions GDPR or deletion requests, use the privacy macro and cc legal@ — do not improvise answers on this, ever
how do i see a customer's rate limit usage? they claim they're being throttled at half the documented limit
admin panel > account > api usage. also check if they're on the legacy plan, those have the old lower limits (see the rate limiting page on Confluence)
that was it, legacy plan. thanks lucy!
